---
about:
  id: Resume-Main
  template: broadside
  image: Headshot1.png
  image-width: 250px

format:
  html:
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 0px
      body-width: 1300px
      margin-width: 0px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem
    max-width: 1600px
---

# Jonathan Barnes

::: {#Resume-Main}
+----------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------+----------------------------------------+
|                                        | **Languages & Tools**                   |                                        |
+:======================================:+:=======================================:+:======================================:+
| R                                      | Python                                  | SQL                                    |
|                                        |                                         |                                        |
| Shiny                                  | Bash                                    | Linux                                  |
|                                        |                                         |                                        |
| Git                                    | PowerShell                              | API's                                  |
|                                        |                                         |                                        |
| Tableau                                | Azure                                   | AWS                                    |
+----------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------+----------------------------------------+
|                                        | **Competencies**                        |                                        |
+----------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------+----------------------------------------+
| Data Visualization                     | Data Cleaning                           | Data Pipelines                         |
|                                        |                                         |                                        |
| Data Communication                     | Relational Databases                    | Geospatial Visualization               |
|                                        |                                         |                                        |
| Feature Engineering                    | Regression Analysis                     | Predictive Modeling                    |
|                                        |                                         |                                        |
| Machine Learning                       | Dimensionality Reduction                | Clustering                             |
|                                        |                                         |                                        |
| Classification                         | Longitudinal Data Analysis              | Data Privacy                           |
+----------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------+----------------------------------------+
|                                        | **Statistical Methods**                 |                                        |
+----------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------+----------------------------------------+
| Generalized Linear Models (GLM)        | Logistic Regression                     | Random Forest                          |
|                                        |                                         |                                        |
| Gradient Boosting                      | K-means                                 | Gaussian Mixture Models (GMM)          |
|                                        |                                         |                                        |
| Generalized Estimating Equations (GEE) | Principal Component Analysis (PCA)      | Multiple Correspondence Analysis (MCA) |
|                                        |                                         |                                        |
| Ridge Regression (L2)                  | Generalized Mixed Effects Models (GLMM) | Lasso Regression (L1)                  |
|                                        |                                         |                                        |
| Cox Hazard                             | Elastic Net Regression (L1/L2)          | Structural Equation Models (SEM).      |
+----------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------+----------------------------------------+
:::

### University of Minnesota, Minneapolis, MN

**Graduate Teaching Assistant \| Biostatistics 1 (Aug. 2024 -- Dec. 2024)**\
As a Graduate Teaching Assistant for Biostatistics 1, I led weekly lab sessions in R and SAS, which helped students develop strong skills in statistical programming and data analysis. I provided individualized support during office hours, clarifying complex course concepts and offering personalized guidance to enhance student understanding. Additionally, I evaluated and graded assignments and quizzes, delivering constructive feedback to improve academic performance.

**Graduate Research Assistant (Oct. 2023 -- May 2024)**\
I was a primary analyst for project investigating biomarkers in the NIA-funded Health and Retirement Study (HRS), with a focus on Dementia and Alzheimer's disease. I Conducted comprehensive analyses of plasma biomarkers, developed group classifications based on biomarker elevations, and performed differential gene expression analysis tied to cognitive decline. I built statistical models to examine relationships between cognitive scores and outputs from OLINK and Quanterix platforms and explored the validation of a previously published aging clock model from ARIC study data using HRS datasets.\

### University of St. Thomas, St. Paul and Minneapolis, MN

**ITS Support Services Intern & Service Desk Technician (June 2022 -- Aug. 2023)**\
During my time in ITS Support Services, I received the ITS Outstanding Student Award for my contributions. I worked to proactively identify and fixed process gaps to keep workflows running smoothly and developed a Python application that supported the service desk’s operations. I also set up digital signage across various campuses to provide easy access to information. Additionally, I mentored junior students, helping them take on responsibilities independently once I left. Over two years, I handled over 4,500 service tickets and wrote technical documentation and procedural guides for The Tech Desk, ITS staff, students, and faculty.

**ITS Rollout Intern (May 2022 -- Sept. 2022)**\
As an ITS Intern, I was responsible for imaging, configuring, and installing software on over 1,500 replacement computers, rough 2.5 times the usual annual replacement schedule. I played a key role in assembling an in-house virtual lab to reduce existing AWS EC2 instances in order to reduce operational costs and improved resource management.

**ITS Service Desk Senior Student Technician (Aug. 2021 -- June 2022)**\
In my role as an ITS Service Desk Senior Student Technician, I served as the primary point of contact and partial supervisor for student workers at both phone centers and walk-up desks. I developed and wrote procedural documentation that standardized operations and enhanced service quality within ITS.

<a href="Resume_JonathanBarnes.pdf" download class="btn btn-primary"> <i class="bi bi-save"></i> Download Resume </a>
